1.name: Your child's stats — forever
1.headline: His goals. His season. Never forgotten.
1.subline: Every local league moment — saved on SportyKore.
1.vector_prompt: Flat vector illustration, Nigerian mother on sidelines of dusty local football pitch, young boy in jersey celebrating, mother holding phone (blank screen — you add screenshot in Canva), palm trees and compound buildings, warm sunset, emotional hopeful mood, colors purple #4A148C and gold #E6A817, minimal shapes, no photorealism, space for headline at top, 1080x1920
1.whatsapp_caption: Every goal. Every assist. Every season — saved for your child. SportyKore turns local football into stats your family can keep. Ask your league admin for an invite.

2.name: Scouts see local talent too
2.headline: Local league. Real numbers. One profile.
2.subline: Build your SportyKore player card — goals, league, season.
2.vector_prompt: Vector graphic, confident young Nigerian footballer, floating stat badges (goals, assists), gold connection lines to phone silhouette, purple dark background #121212, scout figure subtle in background, aspirational, headline area top, flat design 1080x1920
2.whatsapp_caption: Talent in your area deserves to be seen. One player profile — your stats, your league, your story. SportyKore.

3.name: Who's top of your area?
3.headline: Sunday league — but with real standings.
3.subline: Follow scores and tables for leagues near you.
3.vector_prompt: Flat vector, Nigerian neighbourhood football rivalry, two team shields, leaderboard podium 1-2-3, small crowd with phones, festive energy, purple header gold accents, map pin icon, 1080x1920, no real club logos
3.whatsapp_caption: No more arguing in the group chat. Check the table on SportyKore. Share with your league 👇

4.name: Run match day like the pros
4.headline: Stop the screenshot scores.
4.subline: Live match center for your league — on SportyKore.
4.vector_prompt: Vector illustration, Nigerian league admin with whistle and phone, left side chaotic chat bubbles right side clean scoreboard 2-1, gold trophy, purple brand frame, professional warm tone, 1080x1920
4.whatsapp_caption: Tired of disputed results? Run live scores and rosters properly. SportyKore for league organisers.

5.name: You got the invite — make it official
5.headline: You're on the team. Prove it.
5.subline: Paste your invite on SportyKore — Profile → Join a league.
5.vector_prompt: Emotional vector, teenager with phone golden glow, teammates lining up in background, jersey name tag filling in, purple and gold, soft sunset Nigerian setting, 1080x1920
5.whatsapp_caption: Got the link from your admin? Open SportyKore → Profile → Join a league. Your name on the sheet starts here.

6.name: Daddy, how many goals did I score?
6.headline: 7 goals. One season. Forever.
6.subline: SportyKore tracks every local league goal.
6.vector_prompt: Heartwarming flat vector, Nigerian father and daughter on sofa, daughter in kit, father showing phone (blank — add screenshot), football boots by door, warm interior, purple UI accent on phone, 1080x1920
6.whatsapp_caption: "Daddy, how many goals?" — Now you'll always know. SportyKore.

7.name: Local ball. Live matches.
7.headline: Where local leagues gather.
7.subline: Live scores. Clear stats. Your community.
7.vector_prompt: Bold vector hero, diverse Nigerian football fans watching pitch at dusk, gold live dot pulse, purple sky gradient #2C0C54 to #121212, modern flat style, large headline zone, 1080x1920
7.whatsapp_caption: Grassroots football deserves broadcast-level care. SportyKore — local leagues, live matches, real stats.
